changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-fields/src/validation.rs:147,167

Coverage: 92.5% (49/53 lines)

Two uncovered branches in default_reference_validation():
1. Line 147: Null value for array reference returns empty array — test with Value::Null on a multiple:true reference
2. Line 167: Non-string value for single reference returns value unchanged — test with Value::Number on a multiple:false reference

These are boundary cases for malformed input to the reference validator. #coverage-gap
